summary: Rebuilt SSH import sheet around all registry SSH targets, explicit paste/parse state, parsed-destination host/target assignment, existing-host SSH target creation, and snapshot-returning save callbacks.
Added standard macOS Edit menu and window-level paste key equivalent so Command+V reaches focused text responders in the hand-built AppKit shell.
